## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Alex AI and Growth X to discuss content strategy, performance tracking, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/ER-VgexXVCT491fA3ryYBcByVwxZ3UFh?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog content improvements: Reduce product mentions, focus on implementation guidance and industry best practices](https://fathom.video/share/ER-VgexXVCT491fA3ryYBcByVwxZ3UFh?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Performance tracking: New Looker dashboard and Scrunch AI visibility tool set up to monitor content impact](https://fathom.video/share/ER-VgexXVCT491fA3ryYBcByVwxZ3UFh?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Content production: Ramping up to 2 blogs/week, aiming for 5/week; focusing on SEO-driven topics](https://fathom.video/share/ER-VgexXVCT491fA3ryYBcByVwxZ3UFh?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Visual identity: Temporary image guidelines needed for initial blog posts, pending full website redesign](https://fathom.video/share/ER-VgexXVCT491fA3ryYBcByVwxZ3UFh?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Blog v2 shows significant improvement; focus on reducing direct product mentions](https://fathom.video/share/ER-VgexXVCT491fA3ryYBcByVwxZ3UFh?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Shift language from "AI recruiter" to "AI recruiting partner" for better positioning](https://fathom.video/share/ER-VgexXVCT491fA3ryYBcByVwxZ3UFh?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [Incorporate bias audit information, linking to third-party audit page (trust.warden-ai.com)](https://fathom.video/share/ER-VgexXVCT491fA3ryYBcByVwxZ3UFh?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Implement a 4-week plan as general industry guidance rather than Alex AI-specific](https://fathom.video/share/ER-VgexXVCT491fA3ryYBcByVwxZ3UFh?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Consider future separation of product announcements from SEO content, potentially via filtered blog views](https://fathom.video/share/ER-VgexXVCT491fA3ryYBcByVwxZ3UFh?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)

### Performance Tracking Setup

  - [Looker dashboard created with access to Google Search Console and GA4 data](https://fathom.video/share/ER-VgexXVCT491fA3ryYBcByVwxZ3UFh?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Key metrics: sessions vs. engaged sessions, landing page performance, query ranking distribution](https://fathom.video/share/ER-VgexXVCT491fA3ryYBcByVwxZ3UFh?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [Conversion events tracking set up; needs clarification on specific event meanings (e.g., form submit, form start)](https://fathom.video/share/ER-VgexXVCT491fA3ryYBcByVwxZ3UFh?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [LLM referral breakdown shows traffic sources from various AI platforms](https://fathom.video/share/ER-VgexXVCT491fA3ryYBcByVwxZ3UFh?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)

### AI Visibility Monitoring

  - [Scrunch tool implemented to track Alex AI's presence in AI prompts](https://fathom.video/share/ER-VgexXVCT491fA3ryYBcByVwxZ3UFh?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
  - [140 initial prompts uploaded; more can be added as needed](https://fathom.video/share/ER-VgexXVCT491fA3ryYBcByVwxZ3UFh?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Reddit, company website, and review platforms (G2, TrustRadius) identified as crucial for LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/ER-VgexXVCT491fA3ryYBcByVwxZ3UFh?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)

### Visual Identity Updates

  - [Website undergoing complete redesign; will impact blog image guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/ER-VgexXVCT491fA3ryYBcByVwxZ3UFh?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
  - [Temporary image creation workflow to be set up by Katya (designer) for initial blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/ER-VgexXVCT491fA3ryYBcByVwxZ3UFh?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [New custom fonts to be shared for consistent branding](https://fathom.video/share/ER-VgexXVCT491fA3ryYBcByVwxZ3UFh?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Publish 2 blogs this week, gradually increasing to 5 per week](https://fathom.video/share/ER-VgexXVCT491fA3ryYBcByVwxZ3UFh?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Donald to provide new brand fonts and colors for temporary image guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/ER-VgexXVCT491fA3ryYBcByVwxZ3UFh?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [Nathalie to send meeting recap and action items via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/ER-VgexXVCT491fA3ryYBcByVwxZ3UFh?tab=summary&timestamp=1739.0)
  - [Team to update Scrunch with more prompts if provided](https://fathom.video/share/ER-VgexXVCT491fA3ryYBcByVwxZ3UFh?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Clarify meanings of specific conversion events in GA4 for better tracking](https://fathom.video/share/ER-VgexXVCT491fA3ryYBcByVwxZ3UFh?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Continue refining blog content based on feedback, focusing on industry guidance and reducing direct product mentions](https://fathom.video/share/ER-VgexXVCT491fA3ryYBcByVwxZ3UFh?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
